title: Build an Array With Stack Operations

testcases.input: target = [1,3], n = 3 Output: ["Push","Push","Pop","Push"] Explanation: Initially the stack s is empty. The last element is the top of the stack. Read 1 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1]. Read 2 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1,2]. Pop the integer on the top of the stack. s = [1]. Read 3 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1,3].
testcases.expectedOutput: ["Push","Push","Pop","Push"] Explanation: Initially the stack s is empty. The last element is the top of the stack. Read 1 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1]. Read 2 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1,2]. Pop the integer on the top of the stack. s = [1]. Read 3 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1,3].

testcases.input: target = [1,2,3], n = 3 Output: ["Push","Push","Push"] Explanation: Initially the stack s is empty. The last element is the top of the stack. Read 1 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1]. Read 2 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1,2]. Read 3 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1,2,3].
testcases.expectedOutput: ["Push","Push","Push"] Explanation: Initially the stack s is empty. The last element is the top of the stack. Read 1 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1]. Read 2 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1,2]. Read 3 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1,2,3].

testcases.input: target = [1,2], n = 4 Output: ["Push","Push"] Explanation: Initially the stack s is empty. The last element is the top of the stack. Read 1 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1]. Read 2 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1,2]. Since the stack (from the bottom to the top) is equal to target, we stop the stack operations. The answers that read integer 3 from the stream are not accepted.
testcases.expectedOutput: ["Push","Push"] Explanation: Initially the stack s is empty. The last element is the top of the stack. Read 1 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1]. Read 2 from the stream and push it to the stack. s = [1,2]. Since the stack (from the bottom to the top) is equal to target, we stop the stack operations. The answers that read integer 3 from the stream are not accepted.
